summary: Frontend-only verification of two targeted bug fixes in the F-Class PWA: (1) Decimal-separator warning modal and (2) AI powder-data fetch no longer falsely reporting 'no connection'. All four review scenarios pass end-to-end in the live preview URL with no code changes needed.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: <span> wrapper rendered inside <option> by x-source instrumentation. Cosmetic only, not blocking; not introduced by this iteration.

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx decimal-warning regex /^[+-]?[\d.,\s]*$/ + must contain a digit + must contain a comma: correctly triggers on '0,343' / '42,0' and correctly ignores text-field values containing letters such as 'Lapua, lote viejo' and '185gr, test'.

api.js powderData() no longer guards on navigator.onLine; it just performs the fetch and surfaces a toast on real network failure. Phase2.fetchPowder catches the error and shows a Spanish toast pointing the user to the manual fallback. Confirmed real online call returns ~41/45 gr for Berger 185gr + Hodgdon Varget in <5s.
Phase2.setPowderField recomputes max_plus_10 on every manual edit: 42.0/44.0 -> 48.40 gr confirmed in UI (red monospace text).

Minor (not blocking, pre-existing): the global 'input' listener in Home.jsx fires on every keystroke. For very long numeric-looking strings ('Lapua, lote viejo' would never match because of letters, so OK), but the modal is only auto-dismissed via the OK button — acceptable UX.

success_rate.backend: n/a (frontend-only request, but POST /api/powder-data spot-checked via curl and returned valid numeric min/max/notes)

test_credentials: n/a — no auth, fully offline localStorage app.
seed_data_creation: Playwright test cleared localStorage and then created a '.308 Winchester / Lapua / D1' project. Project remains in localStorage of the test browser session only; no impact on shared backend state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Decimal-separator modal lives in /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx (data-testid='decimal-warning-modal', dismiss via 'decimal-warning-ok'). It uses a global capture-phase 'input' listener with regex /^[+-]?[\d.,\s]*$/ — so to NOT trigger it on a text field, just type any letter alongside the comma. The /api/powder-data endpoint is reachable from the preview URL and responds with {min_grains, max_grains, max_plus_10, notes} in ~3-5s for typical bullet/powder combos. Manual entry path: setPowderField in Phase2.jsx recalculates max_plus_10 = round(max * 1.1 * 100)/100.

test_run_evidence.decimal_warning_numeric_field_bush_neck_: value '0,343' -> modal visible TRUE, OK click dismisses (visible FALSE)
test_run_evidence.no_warning_text_field_bullet_brand: value 'Lapua, lote viejo' -> modal visible FALSE (expected)
test_run_evidence.powder_data_online: Berger / 185gr / Hodgdon / Varget filled powder-min=41 and powder-max=45 within ~4s; Máxima +10% block displayed '49.50 gr'; no false 'sin conexión' toast appeared.
test_run_evidence.powder_data_manual: Manual 42.0 / 44.0 -> Máxima +10% block displayed '48.40 gr' (exactly as required).
test_run_evidence.backend_curl_spot_check: POST /api/powder-data with same payload returned {"min_grains":40.5,"max_grains":45.0,"max_plus_10":49.5,"notes":"Empezar siempre por la carga mínima..."}

rca of the issue: Not applicable — both reported fixes (decimal warning modal & removal of navigator.onLine guard in api.powderData) are verified working as intended on the live preview.
